name: tess-r1-abliterated
readme_html:
This is an uncensored version of migtissera/Tess-R1-Limerick-Llama-3.1-70B created with abliteration (see remove-refusals-with-transformers to know more about it).
This is a crude, proof-of-concept implementation to remove refusals from an LLM model without using TransformerLens.

References

HuggingFace
